description_long: This is a slender, elongated canoe crafted from a light brown wood, featuring a gently curved hull and a pointed bow and stern. The canoe has visible wooden thwarts crossing its width, providing structural support and seating. Along the top edges, the gunwales are subtly defined, running the length of the vessel. A single wooden paddle rests across the rear section, indicating its intended use for manual propulsion. The surface of the canoe is smooth with a matte finish, and the wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a natural, handcrafted appearance. There are no visible registration numbers or decorative markings on the exterior.
description: A long, narrow wooden canoe with visible thwarts, gunwales, and a paddle resting across the rear. The surface is smooth and natural, with a light brown wood grain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the canoe, the gentle curve of the hull, and the paddle resting near the rear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, the width of the canoe, and the paddle extending to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the continuous curve of the hull and the absence of the paddle on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, the width of the canoe, and the paddle extending outward.
